metadata.description: Development suite for Claude Code. Cognitive translation (gabe-lens), adversarial gap review (gabe-roast), short-sighted-user UX walkthrough (gabe-myopic), risk-priced code review (gabe-review), alignment (gabe-align), impact assessment (gabe-assess), health audit (gabe-health), context-aware guide (gabe-help), planning + execute + commit + push lifecycle, and the KDBP knowledge system.

plugins.name: gabe-suite
plugins.description: Development suite — cognitive translation, adversarial review, risk-priced code review, planning/execute/commit/push lifecycle, KDBP knowledge system.
